title: Cold crate
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Cold_crate.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A cold crate]]
'''Cold crates''' were chilled containers frequently used to transport cargo. A variety of models and sizes existed, though the typical size was one meter wide by two meters long by one meter deep.

Cold crates maintained a constant low temperature through the use of a cryogenic unit mounted on one end, aided by insulated casing. Each cold crate had sufficient power to maintain a frozen temperature for up to 50 hours.

A common model was the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub]] [[CLD-50 Cryo-Case]], which cost around 250 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. On one occasion, [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]] smuggled [[Ryll/Legends|ryll]] spice in the bottom of a cold crate covered by [[Frella fish/Legends|frella fish]]. When she was boarded by the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer|''Victory'-class Star Destroyer]] [[Sentinel (Victory-class)|''Sentinel'']], they failed to find the ryll in the crate.

==Sources==
